parlay.reason:
Both legs are independently sourced — WAS edge is driven by Avila's catastrophic starting pitching profile and a hot WSH offense, while TOR edge is driven by Scherzer's genuine velocity/command decline in a separate market; the two games share no correlated factors (different times, different parks, different divisional contexts). Combined implied probability at +176 is ~36.2%, slightly above my 32.8% estimate, so this is a marginal parlay — I'm including it at minimum stake (1 unit) as a supplementary play only.
